scripts.test: npm run test:ts && python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
scripts.test:ts: npx tsc -p agenticflow/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p engineering-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p engineering-capability-pack/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p engineering-science-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p manufacturing-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p drawing-intelligence-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p knowledge-graph/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p drawing-to-boq-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p drawing-to-manufacturing-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p workflow-orchestration-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.vertical-slice: node scripts/clean-tmp.js && npx tsc -p agenticflow/tsconfig.json && node .tmp/agenticflow/patchd-core/vertical-slice/runVerticalSlice.js
